recommendations.title: The Penguin Lessons
recommendations.overview: In 1976, as Argentina descends into violence and chaos, a world-weary English teacher regains his compassion for others thanks to an unlikely friendship with a penguin.

recommendations.title: The Rocker
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, a drummer is abandoned by his band just before they become rock superstars. Twenty years later, the drummer sees his second chance at stardom arise when he is asked to perform with his teenage nephew's high school rock band.

recommendations.title: Military Wives
recommendations.overview: Inspired by global phenomenon of military wives choirs, the story celebrates a band of misfit women who form a choir on a military base. As unexpected bonds of friendship flourish, music and laughter transform their lives, helping each other to overc

recommendations.title: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
recommendations.overview: A card shark and his unwillingly-enlisted friends need to make a lot of cash quick after losing a sketchy poker match. To do this they decide to pull a heist on a small-time gang who happen to be operating out of the flat next door.

recommendations.title: All-Time High
recommendations.overview: A con artist in dire need of cash and a woman with a crypto fortune hit it off. Is she the target of his dreams, or is the scammer about to get scammed?

recommendations.title: Donnybrook
recommendations.overview: An ex-marine who struggles to provide for his family and a violent drug dealer with an undefeated fighting record are determined to compete in the Donnybrook, a legendary, bare-knuckle brawl with a cash prize of $100,000.

recommendations.title: American Graffiti
recommendations.overview: A couple of high school graduates spend one final night cruising the strip with their buddies before they go off to college.

recommendations.title: The Dirt
recommendations.overview: The story of Mötley Crüe and their rise from the Sunset Strip club scene of the early 1980s to superstardom.

recommendations.title: A Walk in the Clouds
recommendations.overview: World War II vet Paul Sutton falls for a pregnant and unwed woman who persuades him -- during their first encounter -- to pose as her husband so she can face her family.

recommendations.title: American Satan
recommendations.overview: A young rock band, half from England and half from the US, drop out of college and move to the Sunset Strip to chase their dreams.
